violations.text: The walk-in freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025
The condenser pipe in the meat cooler is in poor repair. Leak observed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

The floor behind the canned goods shelf near the bakery room has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Deli meats were observed held at 45-47 degrees Fahrenheit in the low boy unit in the deli department. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, the deli meat had been out of temperature for an unknown amount of time. Deli meats were voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The low boy unit was taken out of service at time of inspection and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

Deli meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

Burrito bowls, packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings in the stock room, bread shelves, and cat and dog food shelves. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Pest control logs were reviewed. The last service date was on 5/27/23. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

The loading dock door and door to the outside, located in the back stock room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the hack saw have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
